per_outcome.operationalization: count of all commits submitted per developer per quarter, extracted from repository logs
count of commits containing new function definitions per quarter, detected via code parsing; measures type of innovation rather than speed or quality of output
count of commits without new function definitions per quarter; measures type of work (refinement vs. new capability) rather than speed or quality
count of commits classified as introducing new functionality per quarter via LLM classification; measures innovation type rather than speed or quality
count of commits classified as maintenance (bug fixes, refactoring, etc.) per quarter via LLM; measures work type rather than speed or quality
count of new package releases published per quarter, extracted from package registry data
